title: trading-trailer
brief: A cinematic trailer about options trading strategies including calls, puts, Greeks (delta, gamma, theta, vega), iron condor, straddle, VIX volatility, and the wheel strategy.
global_style: cinematic 35mm anamorphic lens, deep shadow contrast, cool blue and amber color grading, financial thriller atmosphere, sharp focus on subjects with bokeh backgrounds

scenes.storyboard_prompt: Extreme close-up of a glowing options chain on a dark terminal screen, rows of strike prices in white, call premiums glowing green on the left, put premiums glowing red on the right, implied volatility percentages pulsing like a heartbeat, the entire screen reflected in the face of a focused trader in shadow
scenes.video_prompt: options chain data scrolling and updating in real time, green and red values flickering, IV numbers pulsing, traders reflection watching intently
scenes.camera: tight close-up on terminal screen, slight push in toward the data
scenes.motion: strike prices scrolling, bid-ask spreads tightening and widening, numbers alive with market movement
scenes.style: deep black background, neon green calls, crimson puts, high contrast data visualization

scenes.storyboard_prompt: A dramatic visualization of the four Greek letters Delta, Gamma, Theta, Vega as towering glowing symbols in a dark void, each Greek letter surrounded by pulsing equations and flowing data streams, Delta in electric blue showing directional arrows, Theta in deep red dissolving like sand through an hourglass, Gamma in bright white showing curve acceleration, Vega in purple showing volatility waves
scenes.video_prompt: Greek letters rotating slowly in space, equations flowing around them like living data, each symbol radiating its meaning through light and motion
scenes.camera: slow orbit around the floating Greek symbols, wide cinematic lens
scenes.motion: letters rotating and pulsing, data streams flowing between them, light radiating outward
scenes.style: deep space black, each Greek symbol in its own color, cosmic financial mythology

scenes.storyboard_prompt: A lone trader sits in a darkened war room surrounded by six monitors, one monitor shows a bull call spread profit and loss diagram with a clear profit zone highlighted in bright green, the trader points at the breakeven line with a focused expression, charts and options flow data fill every other screen
scenes.video_prompt: trader analyzing the bull call spread diagram, PnL curve animating upward through the profit zone, screens flickering with live data
scenes.camera: medium shot from behind the trader looking at the screens, slow push in
scenes.motion: PnL diagram animating, cursor moving along the profit curve, screens updating with market data
scenes.style: dark room, multiple screen glow, intense focused atmosphere, green profit highlight

scenes.storyboard_prompt: A massive glowing hourglass made entirely of stock tickers and option premium numbers, sand falling through it as time decay consumes the value, the word THETA burns in amber at the base, a trader watches helplessly as the premium erodes, cinematic metaphor for time decay destroying option value
scenes.video_prompt: sand falling through the hourglass as ticker symbols, premium numbers decreasing with each grain, THETA glowing ominously below
scenes.camera: medium wide shot, hourglass centered, trader silhouette to the side
scenes.motion: sand falling in slow motion, numbers dissolving downward, amber glow intensifying
scenes.style: dark amber lighting, ominous atmosphere, financial time pressure

scenes.storyboard_prompt: The VIX fear index spiking violently on a massive screen like a seismic earthquake graph, the number 40 flashing in blood red as implied volatility explodes, traders in the background running and shouting, option premiums shown as skyrocketing mountains on adjacent screens, the chaos of a volatility crush event
scenes.video_prompt: VIX line spiking dramatically upward, screens flashing red alerts, background traders reacting with urgency, option premiums surging
scenes.camera: low angle looking up at the VIX screen, wide anamorphic lens capturing the chaos
scenes.motion: VIX line shooting upward violently, alert notifications cascading, frantic background activity
scenes.style: blood red emergency lighting, urgent chaos, financial panic atmosphere

scenes.storyboard_prompt: An iron condor options strategy diagram glows in midair like a holographic fortress, four option legs visualized as glowing pillars forming a rectangular profit zone in the center, the profit corridor highlighted in gold between the two breakeven points, implied volatility bands shown as walls on either side, a trader stands inside the profit zone like a commander in a stronghold
scenes.video_prompt: holographic iron condor diagram rotating slowly, profit zone glowing gold, breakeven walls pulsing, trader figure standing within the strategy
scenes.camera: slow cinematic orbit around the holographic strategy diagram
scenes.motion: diagram rotating in place, profit zone pulsing golden light, volatility walls shimmering
scenes.style: deep blue holographic display, gold profit zone, fortress-like financial strategy visualization

scenes.storyboard_prompt: Extreme close-up of a trading screen moments before an earnings announcement, a straddle position shown with both a call and put highlighted in equal brightness, the countdown timer reads 00:03:00 in large digits, the implied volatility crush warning flashes, a hand poised over the mouse ready to execute, sweat on the knuckles visible under screen light
scenes.video_prompt: countdown timer ticking down, straddle position showing both legs live, IV crush warning flashing, hand trembling slightly over the mouse
scenes.camera: tight close-up alternating between countdown and traders hand
scenes.motion: timer counting down with urgency, IV numbers pulsing, hand hovering with tension
scenes.style: high tension blue light, sharp focus on details, dramatic pre-earnings atmosphere

scenes.storyboard_prompt: A breathtaking view from inside a glass skyscraper trading floor at night, floor-to-ceiling windows reveal the illuminated city below, a massive options flow dashboard covers one entire wall showing unusual call sweeps in bright green arrows, dark money moving through the market visualized as glowing rivers of capital flowing across a financial map of America
scenes.video_prompt: options flow dashboard updating with unusual sweeps, green arrows cascading across the wall, capital flow rivers moving across the financial map
scenes.camera: wide establishing shot of the trading floor with city backdrop
scenes.motion: flow data updating dynamically, green sweep arrows appearing, capital rivers flowing across the map
scenes.style: nighttime city glow, monumental trading floor, dark money visualization

scenes.storyboard_prompt: A profit and loss curve shoots upward like a rocket breaking through layers of cloud into clear sky, the y-axis shows dollar amounts climbing from thousands to millions, the expiration date marker approaches like a finish line in the distance, multiple winning options positions shown as ascending lines in green and gold trailing behind the main rocket curve
scenes.video_prompt: PnL rocket curve accelerating upward through clouds, dollar amounts climbing, expiration finish line approaching, trailing winning positions in formation
scenes.camera: vertical tracking shot following the ascending curve upward
scenes.motion: curve shooting upward with explosive momentum, clouds parting, numbers climbing rapidly
scenes.style: clear blue sky above storm clouds, electric green and gold curves, triumphant financial ascent

scenes.storyboard_prompt: A masterful trader stands at a floor-to-ceiling window at dawn, a tablet in hand showing a perfectly balanced options portfolio with positions in green, the rising sun behind the city skyline creates a golden silhouette, on the tablet screen a wheel strategy income dashboard shows consistent monthly premium income as a glowing green bar chart, the master of options strategy surveys their financial kingdom
scenes.video_prompt: sunrise spreading golden light across the city, trader reviewing their options portfolio on the tablet, income bars glowing green, contemplative mastery
scenes.camera: wide shot at window level, sunrise behind, slow zoom in on the tablet screen
scenes.motion: sunrise light spreading, income bars updating with new premium collected, wind gently moving clothing
scenes.style: golden hour dawn, silhouette mastery, green income visualization, triumphant resolution
